name: CHAGAS DISEASE
definition: damage of ganglion cells by neurotoxin liberated from protozoa Trypanosoma cruzi resulting

demographics.Histo: decreased number of cells in medullary dorsal motor nucleus + Wallerian degeneration

discriminating_features: pulmonary edema, septal lines, pleural effusion ← chronic heart failure

Esophagus: changes as in achalasia: pulmonary edema, septal lines, pleural effusion ← chronic heart failure
